Expected Result: User is redirected to dashboard page

Description: Verify error message for invalid username
Test Steps: 1. Open the application URL 2. Enter invalid username 'invaliduser' 3. Enter password 'admin123' 4. Click 'Continue to dashboard' button
Expected Result: Error message 'Invalid username or password' is displayed

Description: Verify error message for invalid password
Test Steps: 1. Open the application URL 2. Enter username 'admin' 3. Enter invalid password 'wrongpass' 4. Click 'Continue to dashboard' button
Expected Result: Error message 'Invalid username or password' is displayed

Description: Verify validation for empty username and password
Test Steps: 1. Open the application URL 2. Leave username and password empty 3. Click 'Continue to dashboard' button
Expected Result: Validation errors for required fields are displayed
